params.name: Veiled Lady
params.description:
On May 18, 1847 AD, Giovanni carved this statue.
The Veiled Lady, a sculpture by master carver Giovanni, portrays Mary with a veil realistically covering her facial features. Her eyes are closed, and her head is bowed downward, as if she is peacefully praying or mourning.
